creator: royce@alaska.net
text:
This sparc64 list thread: http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-sparc64/2007-February/004610.html .. shows a successful dmesg for the Ultra 450 as of 5.4-RC3. The Ultra 450 is a system similar to the Enterprise 450. The thread shows at least one expert confirmation, albeit wry. :) --- sparc.sgml Mon Oct 16 10:06:12 2006 +++ sparc.sgml.new Fri Feb 9 20:23:47 2007 @@ -104,6 +104,7 @@
  • Ultra 30
  • Ultra 60
  • Ultra 80
    • +
  • Ultra 450

    • The following systems are supported, but can only be netbooted due to Fix: Apply attached patch. How-To-Repeat: n/a
